name: zerogravitynky/zg-icon-cards
title: ZG Icon Cards
description: Flexible card grid (2–4 columns) with section headline, intro text, and per-card icon, headline, content, and optional CTA button.

default.headline: Monthly Deposits
default.content: $99 is added to your Beauty Bank each month.

default.headline: Spend Anytime
default.content: Use your funds whenever you're ready, or save up for a larger treatment.

default.headline: Never Expire
default.content: Your banked funds are always yours while your membership is active.

default.headline: Member Savings
default.content: Enjoy 15% off all products and aesthetic services.
